summary.problem: The execution pipeline needed a releasable bundle that proves its contents before packaging and excludes secrets or host-local state.
summary.repair: Verified and tightened the Python bundle packager so it validates the execution manifest, status projection, payload JSON/JSONL, and proof ledger before writing release artifacts; the bundled proof ledger is now a sanitized snapshot that excludes LPS-018 entries while the live append-only ledger remains unchanged.
summary.result: The release bundle, external manifest, validation report, and checksum list are generated from clean-env commands. The zip includes bundle_manifest.json, has no blocked/secret-like entries, excludes LPS-018 proof and LPS-018 ledger entries, and checksum verification passes.

commands.output_summary: package-execution-bundle wrote dist/lifeos-planning-spine-execution-bundle.zip and refreshed the release checksum surfaces; current checksums are intentionally read from dist/lifeos-planning-spine-execution-bundle.SHA256SUMS and generated/execution_bundle.validation_report.json after the final ledger merge.

commands.cmd: jq '{result, output_path, sha256, manifest_sha256, payload_file_count, zip_validation, checksum_manifest_path, exclusions}' generated/execution_bundle.validation_report.json
commands.output_summary: result pass; payload_file_count 92; zip entry_count 93; has_bundle_manifest true; checksum list dist/lifeos-planning-spine-execution-bundle.SHA256SUMS; bundled ledger snapshot excludes LPS-018 entries from the release payload while the live ledger remains append-only.

commands.cmd: env -i PATH=/usr/bin:/bin python3 zip inspection for bundle_manifest.json and blocked entries
commands.output_summary: entry_count 93; has_bundle_manifest true; corrupt_member null; blocked_entry_count 0; has_lps018_proof false; bundled_ledger_entry_count 12; bundled_ledger_lps018_count 0.

script checksum is pinned below; release artifact checksums are intentionally sourced from the final generated checksum list and validation report so the proof record does not create a self-referential bundle checksum loop.

bundled_ledger_snapshot.exclusion_rule: all live LPS-018 proof ledger entries are excluded from the bundled ledger snapshot

scope.proof_record_packaging_note: proof_records/LPS-018.proof.json and LPS-018 ledger entries are intentionally excluded from the release payload to avoid self-referential release checksum loops; the live append-only proof ledger on disk keeps the LPS-018 history.
